property_cases.property: For any sequence of operations, raw_prompts table never has rows deleted or content modified. INSERT is the only mutation allowed.
For any sequence of handle_raw_prompt calls, the count of contexts WHERE status != 'parked' never exceeds 4.
For any pet window state, X11 input shape regions only include the pet sprite bounding box and active bubble bounding boxes. All other pixels pass through.

For any sequence of N raw prompts (3 ≤ N ≤ 5) with random content sizes (1–5000 chars) and random LLM mock delays (0–100ms), the elapsed time from first watcher event to brain emitting on_state_change(intent_created) is < 5000ms. Property tested via randomized input generation across 50+ iterations.
During idle operation (no active contexts, pet breathing animation only), total RSS memory of the Tauri process does not exceed 50MB.
For any call to llm.distill() or llm.compress_batch(), the prompt content passed to the LLM API is identical to the raw input — no sanitization, redaction, or transformation applied.
The only Tauri commands that accept user-generated text content are: submit_manual_intent, correct_intent, and config setters. No other command accepts freeform user text.
